title: bergia perennis subsp. obtusifolia
intro: Bergia perennis subsp. obtusifolia is a subspecies of the Bergia perennis plant, a perennial herb belonging to the family Elatinaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Bergia perennis subsp. obtusifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Bergia perennis subsp. obtusifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
